title: The Straw Hats Choose Their Fights
description: On pages 9–12, the straw hats choose their fights focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as the Straw Hats crash into Arlong Park, and the fight against Arlong’s fish-men begins in earnest.
scene: On pages 9–12, the straw hats choose their fights focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as the Straw Hats crash into Arlong Park, and the fight against Arlong’s fish-men begins in earnest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How dare you deceive me before!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Not only that, you cut down my brethren!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I don't care about ancient history.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter for what reason you want to kill me... the situation's different now.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You guys aren't going to be doing the killing.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's us that's going to be killing you!

dialogue.speaker: Hatchan
dialogue.text: G-Good, Zoro. I'll let you deal with that octopus.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Crap! I accide- ntally let go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Looks like you really DO want to be killed by me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's the guy who saved Gen back at our village...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oh, it's you hooligans from before.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: Oh? Looks like all the cocoyashi villagers are here too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Seeing as how you're all carrying weapons,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I take it that you're all rebelliing.

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
